content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – Module for hypothesis validation
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_7_nda_4

open std.strings

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Types
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties to the agreement (Company, AHPL, etc.)
type Party = {
    name: string
}

@ The purpose of the exchange as defined in Clause 1.1
type Purpose = {
    description: string
}

@ Confidential information as defined in Clause 1.2(a)
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    source: Party,          -- the Discloser
    receiver: Party,        -- the Recipient
    purpose: Purpose,       -- purpose for which the info was disclosed
    content: string,        -- the actual information (abstracted)
    used: bool              -- true if the receiver has used the info
}

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Entities
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The agreement itself, holding the agreed purpose
entity agreement: {
    purpose: Purpose
}

@ A piece of confidential information exchanged under the agreement
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Functions
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Returns true iff the confidential information is used for the purpose
@ that was agreed in the agreement
func used_for_agreed_purpose(info: ConfidentialInfo, agreed: Purpose) -> bool:
    info.purpose = agreed

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Rules
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1(a) – The recipient must not use confidential information
@ for any purpose other than the agreed purpose.
rule O no_use_outside_agreed_purpose:
    not (confidential_info.used and
         not used_for_agreed_purpose(confidential_info, agreement.purpose)) always
```
